changes.description: Raid bulk toggles keep individual difficulties.
changes.details: Bulk Take Gold and Static/Friends changes now preserve each character and gate difficulty instead of temporarily forcing rows into the same difficulty state. The settings view updates immediately without requiring a tab swap or reload.

changes.description: Static bulk toggles update existing rows correctly.
changes.details: Set Static and Clear Static now re-read the latest raid row state while processing characters, so partially marked rows update correctly and no longer report zero changed characters from stale state.
MeowConnect now supports creating groups through Supabase-backed group tables, member invites, compact group management, and group-aware raid assignment data for shared static or friend runs.
Group invite requests are included in the global MeowConnect request notification, so pending group activity can be noticed from outside the MeowConnect settings view.
The group invite field now previews matching MeowConnect profiles while typing without exposing Discord IDs in the visible suggestion list.

changes.description: Static characters can be assigned to groups.
changes.details: Expanded Raid Together character rows now show a compact group selector for your own static-marked characters, allowing a static raid reservation to be linked to one of your MeowConnect groups.
Groups can store an optional uppercase tag of up to five characters. The tag is kept stable for future local dashboard group badges while the current dashboard Static badge remains unchanged.

changes.description: Group owners can rename or delete groups.
changes.details: Owned MeowConnect groups now include compact rename and delete actions. Group names are capped to keep assignment UI clean, while tags stay fixed after creation.
Non-owner group members can leave groups from the same management panel, and group deletion cleans up related members and assignments through Supabase cascade rules.

changes.description: Raid settings can bulk toggle gold and static.
changes.details: Raid Settings rows now include compact bulk toggles under each raid name for Take Gold and Static/Friends across eligible characters. Buy Box remains individually controlled.

Friends and Groups now sit side by side, group rows use tighter spacing, members are shown as stacked round avatars, rename opens only on demand, and delete uses an icon-only action so multiple groups fit cleanly.

changes.description: MeowConnect static display uses group context.
changes.details: Expanded MeowConnect profile rows keep the familiar Static badge while adding group assignment controls for your own static-marked characters and group context for shared reservations.

Before uploading shared roster data, MeowConnect checks whether a character ID already belongs to another Discord profile. Duplicates are skipped, shown in a toast, logged with the blocked character ID, remembered for 24 hours, and rechecked after the cooldown.

changes.description: Group data security uses focused RPC checks.
changes.details: Supabase group and duplicate-character checks now use focused RPC helpers so the client can validate ownership conflicts without exposing broader profile identifiers in the UI.
